types:type.name: auto_d578476c-0794-4e7f-94fc-5d79f3d55697_Input-Attributes
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_d578476c_0794_4e7f_94fc_5d79f3d55697_Input_Attributes = {| clientCertificate?: {| publicKey?: {| |}, "type"?: String, encoded?: Binary |}, headers: {| "X-Approver-Token": String |}, listenerPath: String, method: String, queryParams: {| customerNumber: Number |}, queryString: String, relativePath: String, remoteAddress: String, requestPath: String, requestUri: String, scheme: String, uriParams: {| |}, version: String, localAddress: String |}

types:type.name: auto_d578476c-0794-4e7f-94fc-5d79f3d55697_Output-Payload

%dw 2.0
type auto_d578476c_0794_4e7f_94fc_5d79f3d55697_Output_Payload = {| customerNumber: Number | Null, company: String | Null, currencyCode: String | Null, creditLimitAmount: Number | Null, totalExposureAmount: Number | Null |}

types:type.name: auto_d578476c-0794-4e7f-94fc-5d79f3d55697_Output-Variables-customerInfo
types:type.types:shape:
%dw 2.0
type auto_d578476c_0794_4e7f_94fc_5d79f3d55697_Output_Variables_customerInfo = {| "JDE Token"?: String, "Correlation ID"?: Number, szHoldCode?: String, mnCustomerNumber?: Number, szCompany?: String, szBranchPlant?: String, mnOrderNumber?: Number, szOrderType?: String, szOrderKeyCompany?: String, szOrderSuffix?: String, jdTransactionOrderDate?: DateTime, jdRequestedDate?: DateTime, jdPromisedDate?: DateTime, cOrderOnHold?: String, cExemptCreditHold?: String, mnAmountCreditLimit?: Number, mnAmountTotalExposure?: Number, szCurrencyCodeTo?: String, cCreditCheckMode?: String, mnAmtOpenOrder?: Number, mnAmtInvoicedPriorYr?: Number, mnAmtInvoicedThisYr?: Number, mnAmtLastPaid?: Number, jdDateLastInvoice?: DateTime, jdDateFirstInvoice?: DateTime, jdDateLastPaid?: DateTime, szAgingHeading1?: String, szAgingHeading2?: String, szAgingHeading3?: String, szAgingHeading4?: String, szAgingHeading5?: String, szAgingHeading6?: String, szAgingHeading7?: String, szAgingHeading8?: String, szAgingHeading9?: String, mnAmtFutureDue?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories1?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories2?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories3?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories4?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories5?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories6?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories7?: Number, mnAmtAgingCategories8?: Number, mnAmtDue?: Number, mnNumberOfOpenDrafts?: Number, mnOutstandingDraftAmount?: Number, mnParentAddressNumber?: Number, mnShipToAddressNumber?: Number |} {"typeId": "CreditCheckProcessing"}
